API Boundary Documentation (pandas/polars)

Verified API boundary documentation matches implementation. return_polars=False (default) returns pandas.DataFrame, return_polars=True returns polars.DataFrame. Method signatures and docstrings align with root CLAUDE.md documentation. No discrepancies found.

All other exceptions match their documented locations.
Internal Link Validation

Internal link validation complete. CLAUDE.md files: 73 links OK, 0 errors. In docs/, lychee reported 15 "errors" but these are false positives - root-relative links (/) that lychee can't resolve without root dir. All referenced files exist and are valid per project Link Conventions.
Type Hints and Parameter Documentation

Type hints and parameter documentation verified. All documented parameters in CLAUDE.md and README.md (symbol, start_time, end_time, interval, chart_type, include_source_info, enforce_source, auto_reindex, return_polars) exist in implementation and work correctly. fetch_market_data() signature matches usage examples. No parameter mismatches found.
Streaming API Documentation Accuracy

Streaming API documentation has several inaccuracies in README.md: (1) CryptoKlineVisionData.create_stream() shown as class method but is instance method requiring manager.create_stream(); (2) StreamConfig(symbols=..., interval=...) incorrect - actual is StreamConfig(market_type=MarketType.FUTURES_USDT); (3) update.close_price incorrect - actual is update.close; (4) update.timestamp incorrect - actual is update.open_time; (5) KlineStream doesn't have close() method - use async context manager. src/CLAUDE.md streaming docs are accurate.
Environment Variables & Configuration Docs

Environment variables verified. All three documented vars (CKVD_LOG_LEVEL, CKVD_ENABLE_CACHE, CKVD_USE_POLARS_OUTPUT) are used in code and functional. Found documentation inconsistency: Root CLAUDE.md says CKVD_USE_POLARS_OUTPUT default is "false" but actual code default is True (see config.py: "Default: True (v2.1.0+)"). CKVD_LOG_LEVEL default is ERROR, CKVD_ENABLE_CACHE default is true (handled at CryptoKlineVisionData level, not FeatureFlags).
